items.title_en: Tesla's China-made EV sales jump nearly 40% in May as domestic market rebounds
items.title_zh: 国内市场回暖 特斯拉5月国产电动车销量猛增近40%
items.desc_en: Sales of Tesla's China-made electric vehicles rose by nearly 40% in May amid a broader recovery in the country's competitive market.
items.desc_zh: 随着中国竞争市场的全面复苏，特斯拉中国制造的电动汽车 5 月份销量增长近 40%。

items.title_en: Oil climbs as U.S., Iran trade strikes while Trump says negotiations with Tehran underway

items.desc_en: U.S. Central Command said Tuesday that it had defeated multiple Iranian ballistic missiles following "attempted attacks" by Iran.
items.desc_zh: 美国中央司令部周二表示，在伊朗“企图发动袭击”后，美国中央司令部击落了多枚伊朗弹道导弹。

items.title_en: Seven killed after drone hits bus in Russia-controlled part of Ukraine
items.title_zh: 无人机在俄罗斯控制的乌克兰地区撞上公共汽车，造成七人死亡

items.title_en: U.S. proposes fresh tariffs on 60 economies over forced labor trade practices
items.title_zh: 美国提议对 60 个经济体征收新关税，原因是强迫劳动贸易行为
items.desc_en: USTR has proposed a 10% duty rate for economies that have adopted a full or partial prohibition on forced labor trade, and 12.5% for all other economies.

items.title_en: U.S., Iran intensify attacks as ceasefire frays, peace talks stall
items.title_zh: 由于停火破裂，和平谈判陷入僵局，美国和伊朗加强袭击

items.desc_zh: 由于美国和伊朗未能将脆弱的停火变成持久的和平协议，地区冲突已陷入僵局。

items.title_en: Celebration, shock and scepticism follow Colombia’s presidential election - Al Jazeera
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚总统选举引发庆祝、震惊和怀疑 - 半岛电视台
items.desc_en: Celebration, shock and scepticism follow Colombia’s presidential election  Al JazeeraColombian presidency goes to runoff election that could redefine relations with the US  CNNPro-Trump presidential c
items.desc_zh: 哥伦比亚总统选举结束后，庆祝、震惊和怀疑接踵而至 半岛电视台 哥伦比亚总统进入决选，这可能会重新定义与美国的关系

items.title_en: Microsoft says new quantum chip 1,000 times more reliable than predecessor
items.title_zh: 微软称新量子芯片比前代芯片可靠 1000 倍
items.desc_en: The tech giant predicts it will have a quantum computer that can solve commercially useful problems by the end of the decade.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头预测，到本世纪末，它将拥有一台可以解决商业有用问题的量子计算机。

items.title_en: 'They'll fix the building, but not our souls': Sleepy Kyiv neighbourhood hit in Russian strike
items.title_zh: “他们会修复建筑物，但不会修复我们的灵魂”：沉睡的基辅社区在俄罗斯罢工中遭到袭击
items.desc_en: Scenes of devastation greet residents emerging from underground shelters after a major Russian attack.
items.desc_zh: 俄罗斯发生重大袭击后，从地下避难所出来的居民看到了满目疮痍的景象。

items.title_en: Two arrested after four migrant farm workers killed in Italy minivan fire
items.title_zh: 意大利小型货车火灾中四名农民工丧生，两人被捕
items.desc_en: CCTV images showed two people blocking the van's doors from the outside and throwing liquid inside to start a fire.
items.desc_zh: 闭路电视图像显示，两人从外面堵住货车车门，并向车内扔液体引发火灾。

items.title_en: Mysteriously missing New Jersey congressman receives Trump endorsement
items.title_zh: 神秘失踪的新泽西州国会议员获得特朗普支持
items.desc_en: Republican Congressman Tom Kean Jr has not been seen for months but is expected to win Tuesday's election.
items.desc_zh: 共和党国会议员小汤姆·基恩已经几个月没有露面，但预计将赢得周二的选举。

items.title_en: Israel strikes southern Lebanon but partial truce with Hezbollah appears to hold
items.title_zh: 以色列袭击黎巴嫩南部，但与真主党的部分休战似乎仍然有效
items.desc_en: Israel continues its campaign in the south, though has not struck Beirut after a deal announced by the US.
items.desc_zh: 以色列继续在南部发动攻势，但在美国宣布达成协议后并未袭击贝鲁特。

items.title_zh: Town

items.desc_zh: 助手会了解您的工作方式，然后开始工作。

items.title_en: Canada formally requests renewal of North American free trade pact
items.title_zh: 加拿大正式请求续签北美自由贸易协定
items.desc_en: In a letter to his North American counterparts, US-Canada Trade Minister Dominic LeBlanc said the three countries should renew the USMCA trade deal.
items.desc_zh: 美加贸易部长多米尼克·勒布朗在致北美同行的信中表示，这三个国家应续签《美加墨加协定》(USMCA) 贸易协议。

items.title_en: British couple lose Iran jail sentence appeal, family says
items.title_zh: 家人称英国夫妇伊朗判刑上诉败诉
items.desc_en: Lindsay and Craig Foreman were arrested in January 2025 during a global motorbike journey.
items.desc_zh: Lindsay 和 Craig Foreman 于 2025 年 1 月在一次全球摩托车旅行中被捕。

items.title_en: Instagram AI chatbot tricked by hackers to give access to others' accounts
items.title_zh: Instagram AI 聊天机器人被黑客欺骗以访问他人帐户
items.desc_en: Some reports have linked the incident to recent cases of high-profile Instagram accounts being hijacked.
items.desc_zh: 一些报道将这一事件与最近高调的 Instagram 帐户被劫持的案件联系起来。

items.title_en: Maga influencer admits London Tube station assault
items.title_zh: Maga 影响者承认伦敦地铁站袭击事件
items.desc_en: Melissa Rein Lively accepted a caution, while an assault by beating charge against her was withdrawn.
items.desc_zh: 梅丽莎·雷因·莱弗利接受了警告，而对她的殴打指控也被撤回。

items.title_en: How 'confused' AI rollout hurts firms and baffles staff
items.title_zh: “混乱”的人工智能推出如何伤害公司并让员工感到困惑
items.desc_en: Some firms are putting pressure on staff to use AI, but have not thought through their AI rollout.
items.desc_zh: 一些公司向员工施加压力，要求其使用人工智能，但并未认真考虑人工智能的部署。

items.title_en: OpenAI let ChatGPT aid and abet mass shooters, Florida lawsuit claims
items.title_zh: 佛罗里达州诉讼称 OpenAI 让 ChatGPT 帮助和教唆大规模枪击事件
items.desc_en: Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier alleges OpenAI and boss Sam Altman built a 'web of deceit'
items.desc_zh: 佛罗里达州总检察长 James Uthmeier 指控 OpenAI 和老板 Sam Altman 构建了一个“欺骗网”

items.title_zh: 英国银行被阻止使用网络人工智能工具 Mythos 获得竞争对手 OpenAI 的报价

items.desc_zh: 九家银行已获得 GPT 5.5 Cyber​​ 的访问权限，因为激烈的竞争对手 Anthropic 已阻止其工具的预览。

items.title_en: 'Controversial' North Korean invasion setting for next Call of Duty game
items.title_zh: 下一款《使命召唤》游戏的朝鲜入侵设定“有争议”
items.desc_en: Developer Infinity Ward said the game will be "grounded in the military authenticity" the series is known for.
items.desc_zh: 开发商 Infinity Ward 表示，这款游戏将“植根于该系列闻名的军事真实性”。

items.title_en: Humanoid robots 'the future' of car making, says BMW
items.title_zh: 宝马称人形机器人是汽车制造的“未来”
items.desc_en: BMW is introducing humanoid robots to a car plant in Europe, building on similar projects in the US.
items.desc_zh: 宝马正在向欧洲的一家汽车工厂引入人形机器人，其基础是美国的类似项目。

items.title_en: California Attorney General sues 23andMe successor for 2023 data breach
items.title_zh: 加州总检察长因 2023 年数据泄露起诉 23andMe 继任者
items.desc_en: Attorney General Rob Bonta alleges the company lied about the breach's severity.
items.desc_zh: 司法部长罗布·邦塔 (Rob Bonta) 指控该公司在泄露事件的严重性方面撒了谎。

items.title_en: Valve hikes Steam Deck prices by more than 40%, blaming rising costs
items.title_zh: Valve 将 Steam Deck 价格上调 40% 以上，原因是成本上涨
items.desc_en: The gaming giant said the handheld had not changed but the rise reflected "the current state of component costs"
items.desc_zh: 这家游戏巨头表示，掌上电脑没有改变，但上涨反映了“组件成本的现状”

items.title_en: King's College team wins access to cutting-edge Google quantum chip
items.title_zh: 国王学院团队获得尖端谷歌量子芯片的使用权
items.desc_en: King's College London researchers hope the chip will help answer previously unanswerable questions about the most important natural processes.
items.desc_zh: 伦敦国王学院的研究人员希望该芯片能够帮助回答有关最重要的自然过程的先前无法回答的问题。
